nasb.text: Aaron and his sons shall eat the flesh of the ram and the bread that is in the basket, at the doorway of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: And Aaron and his sons shall eat the flesh of the ram and the bread that is in the basket in the entrance of the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: 亞倫和他的兒子要在會幕的門口吃這公綿羊的肉和籃子裡的餅。

ccb.text: 亚伦父子们可以在会幕的门前吃这些祭肉和篮内的饼。
